subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Word of thine arrival in Kerman was received and thy letter was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان خبر وصول بکرمان رسید و نامه ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @excellence; distinction, @education of children; moral education, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @past, present and future of Iran
